rulings.Case Title: VICTOR AMENTA VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, February 20, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion Denied. Failure to shift burden of proof on false representation, strict liability, and owner/contractor liability. Triable issue of fact regarding negligence cause of action that plaintiff was exposed to defendant's products and causation. Defendant's objections to declarations of Amenta, Ay, and Ciabattari are overruled. =(302/CWW/JW)
